name: 05-12-incoming-developer-codebase-critique
title: feedback: incoming developer codebase critique
description: Record incoming developer critique: Trellis/task/process complexity, giant frontend files, strategy sprawl, checkpoint-only history, and weak user-feedback loop.
scope: developer critique record only; no code/refactor/deletion
creator: lijin
notes: Recorded incoming developer critique. Main risks: workflow theater, giant frontend/product compatibility files, strategy sprawl, tests not aligned with user value, checkpoint-only history, and weak onboarding confidence. Claims are recorded as feedback and should be verified by a follow-up codebase intake audit before refactor/deletion.

recommended_followups: Codebase intake audit for largest/coupled files and test types
Temporary freeze on new brainstorm directions without user evidence
Choose one first-use tavern chat vertical slice
Evidence-based change notes instead of checkpoint-only history
caveats: Specific counts/line numbers are recorded as feedback claims, not freshly verified facts
frontend has script-based tests, but may lack colocated component/user behavior tests
